title: OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CORVALLIS OFFICE OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps older adults and adults with disabilities apply and enroll in Medicaid and Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). 777 NW 9th Street Suite 202C Corvallis, OR 97330 Eligibility: -For assistance enrolling in Medicaid: Age 65 and older and adults with disabilities receiving disability benefits -For assistance with SNAP/food stamps: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities receiving disability benefits -Eligibility for both programs is determined on a case-by-case basis Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 368-7100 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 368-7100 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment and information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, identity, and other documents may be required LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon, 1pm-5pm Services: Food Stamps/SNAP * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Food Stamps/SNAP * Older Adults Medicaid * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Medicaid * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CORVALLIS OFFICE
